title: good: gateway/slip uses pre-allocated buffer and streaming iterator
description: slip.rs:31-39 pre-allocates with capacity estimate avoiding reallocations. SlipFramer uses boxed fixed-size buffer (99-101). SlipFeedIter (157-164) is a clean streaming iterator pattern.
close_reason: Verified: slip.rs already implements these positive patterns. slip_encode pre-allocates with worst-case capacity. SlipFramer uses boxed fixed-size buffer. SlipFeedIter is a clean streaming iterator. No changes needed - this was a 'good' code review finding documenting existing quality.
